artifact.note: This source-fixed replacement is the active runtime candidate. Foundation, all five Workbench targets, all five package-bound focused service suites, and the corrected force-authority canary passed for its exact source, package, and clean harness identities. The accepted canary is scoped and non-certifying; Full Campaign Debug is the next gate. The prior package's focused pass, rejected corrected canary, and preliminary full capture remain immutable historical evidence and do not transfer.

foundation.summary: The retained source/resource contract gate passed inside the release-candidate build for its exact source HEAD.

workbench.summary: PC, PS4, PS5, XBOX_ONE, and XBOX_SERIES validation passed with one common CRC, zero first-party hard errors, and zero cleanup or monitored-boundary residue for the candidate source HEAD.

packagedFocusedAutotests.summary: All five individually named service suites passed against the active staged packed candidate with 5/0/0/0 JUnit totals, valid exact diagnostic classification, zero unapproved hard diagnostics, 40 rehashed envelope files, and zero cleanup or spill residue. This deterministic-service result is package-bound and non-certifying; the corrected Campaign Debug canary remains the next independent gate.

correctedForceAuthorityCanary.summary: The corrected force-authority canary passed against the exact active packed candidate and clean harness: 35/35 focused assertions, 87/87 counted certification conditions, 9 PASS, 1 WARN, 0 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED, 0 SKIPPED, an exact 18-row zero-delta state diff, and final orphan cleanup. Its 2 hard diagnostics were both approved stock identity exceptions; classification was valid with zero unapproved diagnostics. All 10 envelope files were rehashed and cleanup/spill counters were zero. This scoped native engine-world result is accepted but non-certifying; Full Campaign Debug remains required.

focusedForceAuthority.summary: State-only combat-presence, ownership-transition, and town-influence fixtures passed; native world, package, network, restart breadth, performance, and soak remain outside this result.

packagedFocusedAutotests.summary: All five individually named service suites passed against their exact prior staged packed candidate with 5/0/0/0 JUnit totals, valid exact diagnostic classification, zero unapproved hard diagnostics, 40 rehashed envelope files, and zero cleanup or spill residue. This historical result does not transfer to the active replacement package or certify any higher proof rung.

correctedForceAuthorityCanary.error: Campaign Debug runtime completed with unapproved hard diagnostics.
correctedForceAuthorityCanary.summary: The corrected clean-harness force-authority canary preserved all 35/35 focused assertions and 87/87 certification conditions for its exact prior package, then correctly failed closed on one unapproved virtual-machine exception from the MapLocator runtime lifecycle. All 10 envelope files were rehashed and cleanup/spill counters were zero; this immutable rejected result is historical and does not attach to the active replacement package.

fullCampaignDebug.summary: This historical full profile consumed its exact prior packed candidate and produced stable, rehashed, zero-residue raw artifacts, but the original wrapper's reported success is not an acceptance result: its regex missed timestamp-prefixed errors. The corrected canonical-log audit found 25 hard diagnostics, including 13 exact proof-bound intentional fixtures and 10 unapproved diagnostics; the report also remained red at 584 PASS, 49 WARN, 46 FAIL, 7 BLOCKED, and 1 SKIPPED. It does not attach to the active replacement package.

proofRungs.label: Static/source/resource contracts
proofRungs.summary: Retained Foundation evidence is green inside the immutable candidate build for its exact source HEAD.

proofRungs.label: Enforce compile and configuration
proofRungs.summary: All five explicit Workbench targets are retained and green for the candidate source and canonical four-file package build.

proofRungs.label: Deterministic service contracts
proofRungs.summary: All five individually named packaged focused service suites passed against the exact active package and clean harness, with 5/0/0/0 JUnit totals, 11 fully classified hard diagnostics, zero unapproved diagnostics, 40 envelope files rehashed, and zero cleanup or spill residue. This does not certify a higher rung.

proofRungs.label: Native engine-world behavior
proofRungs.summary: The corrected force-authority canary passed against the exact active packed candidate with 35/35 focused assertions, 87/87 counted conditions, valid classification of 2 approved stock diagnostics, 10 rehashed envelope files, and zero cleanup/spill residue. This scoped canary does not certify the full native engine-world rung; Full Campaign Debug remains the next gate.

proofRungs.label: Packaged dedicated server
proofRungs.summary: The active replacement candidate is sealed but has not been launched through the standard dedicated-server runtime gate.

proofRungs.label: Multiple clients, reconnect, and JIP
proofRungs.summary: Host, two-client, reconnect, late-join, and packet-disruption convergence are not certified.

proofRungs.label: Fresh-process restart and fault injection
proofRungs.summary: Selected journal, shutdown, field-vehicle, exact-QRF, counterattack, and rebuild cuts pass; the arbitrary full campaign graph and fault matrix remain open.

proofRungs.label: Performance and long soak
proofRungs.summary: The reported one-second hitch and long-campaign capacity limits have no current immutable-package soak evidence.

proofRungs.label: Canary release
proofRungs.summary: Blocked by every lower unproven release rung.

proofRungs.label: Stable certification
proofRungs.summary: No current matrix row is certified.

activeBlockers.summary: The active source-fixed replacement package has passed Foundation, all five Workbench targets, all five packaged focused service suites, and the corrected force-authority canary, but Full Campaign Debug has not yet run. Dedicated, multiplayer/JIP, restart breadth, performance, and soak remain pending.

Run Full Campaign Debug next against the unchanged active package identity. The active corrected canary is accepted and non-certifying; the prior package's 35/35 canary rejection and preliminary full capture remain immutable historical evidence.
Known command-menu and modal-map defects remain open until source correction plus rendered packaged-client proof.
Natural sustained infantry and convoy travel, identical-waypoint suppression, and measured no-stutter behavior are not proven.
Campaign read-model convergence is not proven with host, two clients, reconnect, JIP, restart, and marker-cap boundaries.
The one-second hitch and bounded-history admission cliffs remain unclosed.
Configured mission breadth still exceeds mission-specific CE 3.11.1 behavioral parity and proof.
Development proof and destructive diagnostic surfaces have not yet been separated from the release package.
